name: useVirtualKeyboard
description: Hook that manages virtual keyboard state
examples: const { opened, show, hide, supported, changeOverlaysContent } = useVirtualKeyboard();
warning: This hook has a fallback for virtual keyboard detection. If the virtual keyboard is not supported, the methods will not work.

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: The initial state value for keyboard visibility

source.source: * @param {boolean} [initialValue=false] The initial state value for keyboard visibility

tokens.name: [initialValue=false]
tokens.description: The initial state value for keyboard visibility

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing keyboard state and control methods

source.source: * @returns {UseVirtualKeyboardReturn} An object containing keyboard state and control methods
